<!-- Thanks for contributing to Thermalith! Keep this short; delete anything that doesn't apply. -->

## What this does

Brief description of the change and why.

Fixes # (issue number, if there is one)

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds clean (`dotnet build`) with no new errors.
- [ ] Tests pass (`dotnet test`); added or updated tests where it made sense.
- [ ] Render/print behaviour checked by hand if this touches the editor or print path (the agent can't see pixels).
- [ ] Commit messages and code match the surrounding style.

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything worth flagging: trade-offs, things you're unsure about, hardware you did or didn't test on.
